channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19642] parallel-scale test_write_append_truncate: FAIL: write_append_truncate failed! 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2958de6b-8eb7-4876-9f8c-b5110085dfe6

test_write_append_truncate failed with the following error:

== parallel-scale test write_append_truncate: write_append_truncate ========================================================== 07:18:02 (1764055082)
CMD: trevis-154vm220.trevis.whamcloud.com getent passwd mpiuser |
			       cut -d: -f3; exit \${PIPESTATUS[0]}
mpi_user=mpiuser MPI_USER_UID=532
CMD: trevis-154vm220.trevis.whamcloud.com getent passwd mpiuser |
			       cut -d: -f4; exit \${PIPESTATUS[0]}
mpi_user=mpiuser MPI_USER_GID=60000
OPTIONS:
clients=trevis-154vm220.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-154vm221
write_REP=10000
write_THREADS=8
MACHINEFILE=/tmp/auster.machines
trevis-154vm220.trevis.whamcloud.com
trevis-154vm221
stripe_count:  1 stripe_size:   4194304 pattern:       0 stripe_offset: -1

+ /usr/lib64/openmpi/bin/write_append_truncate -n 10000 -u /mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat
+ chmod 0777 /mnt/lustre
drwxrwxrwx 5 root root 69632 Nov 25 07:18 /mnt/lustre
+ su mpiuser bash -c "/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin/mpirun --mca btl tcp,self --mca btl_tcp_if_include eth0 -mca boot ssh --oversubscribe -machinefile /tmp/auster.machines -np 16 /usr/lib64/openmpi/bin/write_append_truncate -n 10000 -u /mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat "
r= 0: create /mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat, max size: 3703701, seed 1764055083: ok
r= 0 l=0000: WR A 1188921/0x122439, AP a  685653/0x0a7655, TR@ 1393587/0x1543b3
r= 0 l=1000: WR M     697/0x0002b9, AP m   11991/0x002ed7, TR@ 1192115/0x1230b3
r= 0 l=2000: WR Y  873144/0x0d52b8, AP y 1028579/0x0fb1e3, TR@ 1561944/0x17d558
r= 0 l=3000: WR K  678444/0x0a5a2c, AP k 1180802/0x120482, TR@ 1805942/0x1b8e76
r= 0 l=4000: WR W  441860/0x06be04, AP w  154962/0x025d52, TR@ 1047681/0x0ffc81
r= 0 l=5000: WR I  722466/0x0b0622, AP i    3319/0x000cf7, TR@ 1070187/0x10546b
r= 0 l=5603: trunc-after-APPEND bad [252367-296578]/[0x3d9cf-0x48682] != n
r= 0 l=5603: WR N  252367/0x03d9cf, AP n 1012038/0x0f7146, TR@  296579/0x048683
000000   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N
*
03d9c0   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N   N nul
03d9d0 nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul nul
*
048680 nul nul nul
048683
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
MPI_ABORT was invoked on rank 0 in communicator MPI_COMM_WORLD
  Proc: [[26479,1],0]
  Errorcode: 1

NOTE: invoking MPI_ABORT causes Open MPI to kill all MPI processes.
You may or may not see output from other processes, depending on
exactly when Open MPI kills them.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
�[trevis-154vm220:00000] *** An error occurred in Socket closed
[trevis-154vm220:00000] *** reported by process [1735327745,12]
[trevis-154vm220:00000] *** on a NULL communicator
[trevis-154vm220:00000] *** Unknown error
[trevis-154vm220:00000] *** MPI_ERRORS_ARE_FATAL (processes in this communicator will now abort,
[trevis-154vm220:00000] ***    and MPI will try to terminate your MPI job as well)
� parallel-scale test_write_append_truncate: @@@@@@ FAIL: write_append_truncate failed! 1

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4674 - 6.12.0-55.37.1.el10_0.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4674 - 4.18.0-553.76.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
parallel-scale test_write_append_truncate - write_append_truncate failed! 1

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: The failure occurred frequently on master builds #4673 and #4674.

The above failure is on RHEL 10.0 client. The error messages are different on RHEL 9.5 and 8.10 clients:

== parallel-scale test write_append_truncate: write_append_truncate ========================================================== 09:16:18 (1764062178)
CMD: onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com getent passwd mpiuser |
			       cut -d: -f3; exit \${PIPESTATUS[0]}
mpi_user=mpiuser MPI_USER_UID=532
CMD: onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com getent passwd mpiuser |
			       cut -d: -f4; exit \${PIPESTATUS[0]}
mpi_user=mpiuser MPI_USER_GID=60000
OPTIONS:
clients=onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-158vm153
write_REP=100
write_THREADS=8
MACHINEFILE=/tmp/auster.machines
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com
onyx-158vm153
stripe_count:  1 stripe_size:   4194304 pattern:       0 stripe_offset: -1

+ /usr/lib64/openmpi/bin/write_append_truncate -n 100 -u /mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat
+ chmod 0777 /mnt/lustre
drwxrwxrwx 9 root root 11776 Nov 25 09:16 /mnt/lustre
+ su mpiuser bash -c "/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin/mpirun --mca btl tcp,self --mca btl_tcp_if_include eth0 -mca boot ssh --oversubscribe -machinefile /tmp/auster.machines -np 16 /usr/lib64/openmpi/bin/write_append_truncate -n 100 -u /mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat "
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank15.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank15: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Open MPI failed an OFI Libfabric library call (fi_endpoint).  This is highly
unusual; your job may behave unpredictably (and/or abort) after this.

  Local host: onyx-158vm153
  Location: mtl_ofi_component.c:513
  Error: Invalid argument (22)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank14.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank14: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank1.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank1: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank2.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank2: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank10.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank10: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank11.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank11: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank3.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank3: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank12.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank12: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank9.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank9: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank13: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank8.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank8: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank13.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank5.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank5: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank4.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank4: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank0.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank0: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank6: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank6.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank7.write_append_truncate: Failed to get eth0 (unit 0) cpu set
onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:rank7: PSM3 can't open nic unit: 0 (err=23)
r= 0: create /mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat, max size: 3703701, seed 1764062179: ok
r= 0 l=0000: WR A  829153/0x0ca6e1, AP a  769983/0x0bbfbf, TR@ 1902407/0x1d0747
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
MPI_ABORT was invoked on rank 8 in communicator MPI_COMM_WORLD
with errorcode 2.

NOTE: invoking MPI_ABORT causes Open MPI to kill all MPI processes.
You may or may not see output from other processes, depending on
exactly when Open MPI kills them.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
r= 8 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
[onyx-158vm152:30220] *** An error occurred in MPI_Barrier
[onyx-158vm152:30220] *** reported by process [3732733953,5]
[onyx-158vm152:30220] *** on communicator MPI_COMM_WORLD
[onyx-158vm152:30220] *** MPI_ERR_OTHER: known error not in list
[onyx-158vm152:30220] *** MPI_ERRORS_ARE_FATAL (processes in this communicator will now abort,
[onyx-158vm152:30220] ***    and potentially your MPI job)
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30202] PMIX ERROR: UNREACHABLE in file server/pmix_server.c at line 1741
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30220] pml_ucx.c:907  Error: mca_pml_ucx_send_nbr failed: -25, Connection reset by remote peer
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30207] pml_ucx.c:907  Error: mca_pml_ucx_send_nbr failed: -25, Connection reset by remote peer
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30222] pml_ucx.c:907  Error: mca_pml_ucx_send_nbr failed: -25, Connection reset by remote peer
r=15 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
r=13 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
r= 9 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
r=10 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
r=11 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
r=12 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
r=14 l=0000 onyx-158vm153.onyx.whamcloud.com: open '/mnt/lustre/d0.write_append_truncate/f0.wat' (0): No such file or directory
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30202] 15 more processes have sent help message help-mtl-ofi.txt / OFI call fail
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30202] Set MCA parameter "orte_base_help_aggregate" to 0 to see all help / error messages
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30202] 7 more processes have sent help message help-mpi-api.txt / mpi-abort
[onyx-158vm152.onyx.whamcloud.com:30202] 2 more processes have sent help message help-mpi-errors.txt / mpi_errors_are_fatal
 parallel-scale test_write_append_truncate: @@@@@@ FAIL: write_append_truncate failed! 1

https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/62d13535-9cbc-449b-a650-5e5504dbef8b
